query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "joyai-vl-interaction: real-time vision-language interaction intelligen" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it provides a benchmark platform for real-time vision-language interaction and embodied intelligence in open-world environments, directly extending the scope of the user's referenced work ("JoyAI-VL-Interaction") from indoor to city-scale scenarios. It measures the same core mechanism (real-time V-L interaction for embodied agents) and offers an empirical baseline for evaluating LLMs in this specific domain.
